name: ai-employee-builder
description: Public AI Employee Builder shell that helps buyers connect to the gated AIEB MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Connects Claude Code to the hosted AIEB MCP runtime.
interface.longDescription: A public shell for AI Employee Builder. It contains setup guidance and a local MCP proxy while paid skill instructions are fetched from the licensed AIEB MCP server at runtime.
defaultPrompt: Help me test the AIEB MCP.
